programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: Colonel Von Strohm and Captain Geering are captured by the Communist Resistance.

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programme.desc: BBC Comedy on 9Now provides classic British sitcoms, sketch shows, and stand-up comedy featuring iconic and contemporary UK humor. It streams curated BBC comedy programming including workplace sitcoms, satire, and character-driven series from different eras.

programme.title: Comedy Show
programme.desc: BBC Comedy on 9Now provides classic British sitcoms, sketch shows, and stand-up comedy featuring iconic and contemporary UK humor. It streams curated BBC comedy programming including workplace sitcoms, satire, and character-driven series from different eras.

programme.title: French and Saunders
programme.desc: In the first episode, guest star Alison Moyet is upstaged by none other than Alison Moyet!
